creator: fbsd@www.zefox.net
text:
The patch was copied to /usr/ports and applied with
patch < rust.patch

Poudriere didn't seem to notice the update and re-used the
original lang/rust package, so I ended up manually rm-ing
the lang/rust* package archives from packages/All. That 
seems like like it should have been a mistake, but it worked 
without causing detectable problems. Is there a better way?

Thanks for your help!

bob prohaska
